{{CargoRelic
|name=Wooden Ox
|class_id=20035
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source= Upgrade Madam Huang Wanzhen to T9 in [[Cathay Generals]].
|description=This means of transport was invented by Advisor Zhuge. In the eyes of modern science, it's a human-powered wooden vehicle suitable for mountain terrain with swinging cargo boxes for granular. It's shaped like an ox so that people will have the illusion of being pulled, thus saving a lot of effort!
|fame=17
|art=11
|fth=19
|civ=16
|tech=27
|ss1=Meal Box Cap +100
|ss2=Meal Box Cap +200
|ss3=Meal Box Cap +300
|ss4=Meal Box Cap +300
|ss7=Meal Box Cap +300<br> (Awakened)
}}
